entry.title: Profile Reveal | Xeno-Domain Hacking - Lucy
entry.content:
Loading Data>>>

Lucy

An Edgerunner from the Night City. The Netrunner of her crew.

With a heavy debt in her heart, she deliberately keeps a distance from people. Even those who are closest to her know little of her past.

entry.title: Profile Reveal | Fury-Type Arsenal - Rebecca
entry.content:
Loading Data>>>

Rebecca

An Edgerunner like Lucy, though completely different in her M.O.

A whimsical fireball who's always ready to raze out your troubles with her shotgun.

entry.title: Resonator Reveal | Lucy
entry.content:
Resonator Reveal | Lucy

"I know... the dream had to end."

——————————————————

Wuthering Waves × Cyberpunk: Edgerunners Collaboration is set to launch on June 8th (UTC+8).

The new 5-Star Resonators Lucy and Rebecca will debut, and you can snag the 5-Star Resonator Rebecca for free!

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Version 3.4 Update Maintenance Notice
entry.content:
Dear Rovers,

To bring you exciting new content and a better gaming experience, we will soon be conducting the update maintenance for Version 3.4: The Dream Not Dreamed.

During the maintenance, you will be unable to log in to the game, so please plan your time accordingly. Additionally, due to the large size of the update, we recommend updating the game while connected to a Wi-Fi network. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

[Maintenance Time & Compensation Details]

✦Maintenance Time: 2026-06-08 04:00 - 2026-06-08 11:00 (UTC+8)

✦Maintenance Compensation: Astrite x300, Crystal Solvent x2

✦Compensation Eligibility: Create a character and unlock the Mail feature before 2026-06-08 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation will remain claimable until the next version update.

In the event that the maintenance is extended, the dev team will issue a follow-up notice and adjust the compensation accordingly.

[How to Update]

Once the maintenance for the version update begins, you can follow the following instructions to update your client.

✦PC: Close the game, restart the launcher, and then click on "Update."

✦Android: Launch the game and follow the instructions in the update pop-up window to complete the update.

✦iOS: Download/update the game in the App Store.

✦Mac: Download/update the game in the App Store.

✦PS5™: Open the home screen > Select Wuthering Waves > Press the OPTIONS button to Check for Update.

[Pre-download]

✦Pre-download Start Time: 2026-06-06 10:00 (UTC+8)

[Required Pre-download Storage Space]

✦PC: 17 GB

✦Android: 20 GB

✦iOS: 21 GB

※Please note that pre-download may not be possible if your device does not have enough spare storage space.

※A certain amount of storage space is required for the resources merging process during the update maintenance (PC: 32 GB | Android/iOS: 13 GB). Therefore, the actual size of the pre-downloaded resources is 15 GB on PC, 8 GB on Android, and 8 GB on iOS, respectively. After the update maintenance is complete, the extra space used for the resources merging process will be automatically freed up.

[How to Pre-download]

✦PC: When pre-download for the latest version becomes available, "New Version Pre-download" appears below the "Start" button on the launcher interface. Select this option to pre-download the resources.

✦Android/iOS: When pre-download for the latest version becomes available, press the "Pre-download" button, either on the title screen after a successful login or on the in-game Terminal page, and confirm to pre-download the resources.

You can continue playing the game while the pre-downloading process is ongoing. The process can be paused at any time. Whether it is complete or not, the update maintenance will speed up to a certain degree when initiated.

Please ensure that you have a stable network connection during the pre-downloading process.

[Version 3.4 Preview]

[Collab Resonators]

5-Star Resonator: Lucy (Spectro/Pistols)

※Obtainable through the [Dreaming Upon the Moon] Collab Resonator Convene.

5-Star Resonator: Rebecca (Electro/Pistols)

※Obtainable through the [Rekindled Embers of Rage] Collab Resonator Convene.

[New Resonator]

5-Star Resonator: Lucilla (Glacio/Rectifier)

※Obtainable through the [Tomorrow in the Frame] Featured Resonator Convene.

[Collab Weapons]

5-Star Weapon: Spectral Trigger (Pistols)

※Obtainable through the [Spectral Trigger] Collab Weapon Convene.

5-Star Weapon: Skull Thrasher (Pistols)

※Obtainable through the [Skull Thrasher] Collab Weapon Convene.

[New Weapon]

5-Star Weapon: Freeze Frame (Rectifier)

※Obtainable through the [Freeze Frame] Featured Weapon Convene.

[Collab Area]

Somnoire: Night City

[Collab Echo]

Reminiscence - Nightmare: Adam Smasher

New Sonata Effect: Shadow of Shattered Dreams (1 pcs Set)

[Collab Enemies]

Nightmare: Armed Corpo, Nightmare: Security Corpo, Nightmare: Special Response Corpo

[Collab Story]

[Episodic Quest] Chapter III Side Story: At Dream's Edge

[New Story]

[Main Quest] Chapter III Segue: We Choose the Sky

[Gameplay Optimizations]

Added the Weekly Activity tab and the Weekly Activity event "Phantasma Dreamland: Rhapsody."

Added one-click skill upgrade.

Optimized the functionality of the Resonator Ascension Planner.

Optimized the functionality of the in-game camera.

[Other Optimizations]

Added Megalights, which allows more dynamic lighting on some PCs with Ray Tracing enabled.

[Other Collab Content]

Nightmare Challenge: "Nightmare: Adam Smasher"

Collab Track: I Really Want to Stay At Your House

Collab Sigil: Where Did Your Love Go?

Collab Title: Legend Smasher

Collab WavesLine Looks: David Martinez (WavesLine Chat Bubble) x1, "I miss you all the time" (WavesLine Chat Background) x1

[Other New Content]

New "Tactical Hologram: Synchronization" Challenge: Nameless Explorer

New Phantom Echo: "Phantom: Glommoth"

Expedition Motorbike Liveries: Finish Line, Silent Array

Accessory: Mornye Cube

[New Mech]

Accessories: Lynae - Unbound Brilliance, Mornye - Corner of the Star Sea

[Collab Events]

[Night City Roaming] Featured Collab Event

[Matrix Reform] Collab Puzzle Event

[Instant Flashlight] Collab Special Login Event

[Gifts of Dreamchasers] 10-Day Special Login Event

※The Sweetdream Tuning event will become available along with the upcoming Collab Resonator Convene and Collab Weapon Convene. For details about the event, please refer to the relevant in-game page.

[Special Events]

[Depths of Illusive Realm: Dreamchasers]

[Startorch Racing, Rerun!] Leisure Event

[Dream of Azure Sky] Limited-Time Login Event

※For more details on the new content, optimizations, and bug fixes coming to the game in Version 3.4, please stay tuned for the upcoming release notes.

[Device Requirements]

To ensure a smooth experience, please refer to the following requirements:

  1. Minimum

Android: [System] Android 7.0 or later; [Processor] Snapdragon 835, MediaTek G71/72 or processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 4 GB or more

iOS: [System] iOS 14 or later; [Model] iPhone 11 or newer, iPad with A13 Bionic or processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 4 GB or more

Mac: [System] macOS 12.0 or later; [Model] m1 or newer; [RAM] 16 GB or more

PC: [System] Windows 10 64-bit; [CPU] Intel I5 (9th Gen)/Ryzen 2700; [GPU] Geforce 1060/RX570/Intel ARC A380, [RAM] 16 GB or more

  1. Recommended

Android: [System] Android 7.0 or later; [Processor] Snapdragon 8 Gen1+/Gen2/Gen3 or MediaTek processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 6 GB or more

iOS: [System] iOS 15 or later; [Model] iPhone 13 or newer, iPad with A15 Bionic or processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 6 GB or more

Mac: [System] macOS 15.0 or later; [Model] m3 or newer; [RAM] 16 GB or more

PC: [System] Windows 10 64-bit; [CPU] Intel I7 (9th Gen)/Ryzen 3700, [GPU] Geforce 2060/RX5700XT/Intel ARC A750; [RAM] 16 GB or more

  1. Required Storage Space

Android/iOS: 50 GB

Mac: 135 GB

PC: 135 GB; it's recommended to install the game on an SSD.

PS5™: Please make sure your device has sufficient available storage to complete the update successfully.

  1. Controller Support

Wuthering Waves currently supports the following controllers on Mobile:

Wireless Controllers: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualShock®4, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™

Wuthering Waves currently supports the following controllers on Mac:

Wired/Wireless Controllers: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualShock®4, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™

Wuthering Waves currently supports the following controllers on PC:

Wired/Wireless Controllers: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™

Wired Controllers: DualShock®4

When you connect any other controller that supports multiple input modes to a PC, it is recommended that you set the controller to XInput mode for the best experience.

entry.title: Resonator Reveal | Rebecca
entry.content:
"C'mon, let's crack some skulls!"

——————————————————

Wuthering Waves × Cyberpunk: Edgerunners Collaboration is set to launch on June 8th (UTC+8).

The new 5-Star Resonators Lucy and Rebecca will debut, and you can snag the 5-Star Resonator Rebecca for free!

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Version Preview | Version 3.4 "The Dream Not Dreamed" Scheduled for Release on June 8 (UTC+8)
entry.content: The Preview Special Broadcast has concluded. Take a look back at all these exciting updates:

entry.title: Wuthering Waves x Cyberpunk: Edgerunners Collaborations Info
entry.content: The Wuthering Waves x Cyberpunk: Edgerunners Collab Version "The Dream Not Dreamed" goes live on June 8, 2026. Here's an overview of the upcoming Collab Quests, Collab Events and Collab Convene Events.

entry.title: Version 3.3 Phase II Wuthering Waves Wallpaper
entry.content: "How should I describe this emotion? It's a kind of hate, isn't it?"

entry.title: [Forged Dwarf Star] Featured Weapon Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Forged Dwarf Star, 4-Star Weapons: Fusion Accretion, Waning Redshift, and Novaburst receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-05-21 10:00 - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Forged Dwarf Star.

  • Featured Weapon Forged Dwarf Star is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: [False Promise for Tomorrow] Featured Resonator Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Denia, 4-Star Resonators: Chixia, Buling, and Yangyang receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-05-21 10:00 - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [False Promise for Tomorrow] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Denia is exclusive to the [False Promise for Tomorrow] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Denia's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: Event Preview | [Depths of Illusive Realm: Chromatic Fantasy] Featured Combat Event, Coming Soon!
entry.content:
Duration

2026-05-21 10:00 - 2026-06-07 03:59 (server time)

Rewards

Astrite x800, Fantasy Weaver x1 (Title), Premium Tuner, Premium Resonance Potion, Premium Sealed Tube, Premium Energy Core, Shell Credit, and other Materials.

entry.title: [Version 3.3 Featured Resonator/Weapon Convene: Phase Ⅱ]
entry.content:
[False Promise for Tomorrow] Featured Resonator Convene

During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Denia, 4-Star Resonators: Chixia, Buling, and Yangyang receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-05-21 10:00 - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [False Promise for Tomorrow] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Denia is exclusive to the [False Promise for Tomorrow] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Denia's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Forged Dwarf Star] Featured Weapon Convene

During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Forged Dwarf Star, 4-Star Weapons: Fusion Accretion, Waning Redshift, and Novaburst receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-05-21 10:00 - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Forged Dwarf Star.

  • Featured Weapon Forged Dwarf Star is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Horizon of Dawnbreak] Featured Resonator Convene

During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Chisa, 4-Star Resonators: Chixia, Buling, and Yangyang receive boosted drop rates!✦Duration✦

2026-05-21 10:00 - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time) ✦Eligibility✦- Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point. ✦Convene Rules✦- [Horizon of Dawnbreak] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Chisa is exclusive to the [Horizon of Dawnbreak] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Chisa's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Kumokiri] Featured Weapon Convene

During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Kumokiri, 4-Star Weapons: Fusion Accretion, Waning Redshift, and Novaburst receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-05-21 10:00 - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Kumokiri.

  • Featured Weapon Kumokiri is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Requiem Without End] Featured Resonator Convene

During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Phrolova, 4-Star Resonators: Chixia, Buling, and Yangyang receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-05-21 10:00 - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Requiem Without End] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Phrolova is exclusive to the [Requiem Without End] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Phrolova's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Lethean Elegy] Featured Weapon Convene

During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Lethean Elegy, 4-Star Weapons: Fusion Accretion, Waning Redshift, and Novaburst receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-05-21 10:00 - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Lethean Elegy.

  • Featured Weapon Lethean Elegy is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: Resonator Review | Symphony of Beyond—Phrolova
entry.content:
Phrolova, a Fractsidus Overseer walking the fine line between life and death, an uncanny, deadly conductor.

A silent wave of her baton is enough to attune the very frequencies of being and conduct the symphonies of "souls." The music of hers can sculpt a better world or, just as easily, summon a legion to wreak havoc.

entry.title: Resonator Review | Eye of Unraveling — Chisa
entry.content:
"Just an ordinary student."

Calmly, she introduces herself, a faint iridescent shimmer flickering in her eyes. Again, the structures of the world reveal themselves in her vision. Narrowing her eyes, she singles out the very thread that tugs at life itself.

entry.title: Upcoming Events in Wuthering Waves Version 3.3
entry.content:
Upcoming Events in Wuthering Waves Version 3.3

Here is a compilation of the upcoming events in Version 3.3. Don't miss out!

entry.title: Post-Lament Anthropocene: Stars Intertwined | Denia
entry.content: "Surprised to see me? Haha, relax. I told you we'd meet again."—Denia

entry.title: Profile Reveal | Bubbles of Nihility - Denia
entry.content:
Loading Data>>>

Denia

Denia, a Department of Voidmatters student at Startorch Academy. Also, a professional slacker who has mastered the art of dozing through courses.

Still, she hardly misses any campus event, always there to flash her "gentle" smile to one and all.

entry.title: Post-Lament Anthropocene: Enemies — Denia
entry.content:
Her name, her identity, her Resonance Ability, even the ties she claimed to others... all of it was a lie.

Between you and the Keystone stands nothing more but a puppet who came into existence only because of Aleph-1.

entry.title: Event Preview | [Cubie Derby: Championship] Anniversary Event, Coming Soon!
entry.content:
Duration

2026-05-09 04:00 - 2026-05-25 03:59 (server time)

Rewards

Astrite x300, 2nd Anniversary Coin, Shell Credit

entry.title: [Aced! Combat Mastery Test!] Featured Combat Event
entry.content:
Standard tests make your eyes glaze over, but a test of combat skills sends your adrenaline into overdrive. So bring your A-game and step into the clash for Instructor B.1.N.G.O.'s Combat Mastery Test!

Duration

2026-05-07 04:00 - 2026-05-21 03:59 (server time)

Rewards

Astrite x500, Forgery Advanced Supply - Lahai-Roi x14, Advanced Enclosure Tank - Lahai-Roi x28, Advanced Resonance Potion x20, Advanced Energy Core x20, Shell Credit x420000, and other Materials.

Eligibility

Reach Union Level 14 and unlock the Resonance Nexus of the Startorch Academy during Main Quest Chapter III Act I ""What Burns Beneath Frostlands.""

Event Rules

  • The event features 7 sets of tests. Each set consists of a Preliminary Test with Associate Assessors and a Final Test with a Chief Assessor.

  • Meet the various requirements to buff up the team in the Preliminary Test. All buffs obtained in the Preliminary Test are carried over in the Final Test, where only one objective remains—burn through as much of the Chief Assessor's health bar as possible to rack up your score!
